Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

Class FaviconProvider

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.FaviconProvider
public class FaviconProvider extends Object
Flavor-neutral favicon worker bean shared by the favicon @Rest flavors.

Holds the capability state (the icon bytes + Cache-Control header value) and the serve logic (build an HttpResource with Content-Type: image/x-icon + the cache header). The FaviconMixin (mixin), FaviconResource (child), and FaviconServlet (servlet) flavors are independent @Rest classes that each hold a FaviconProvider worker and delegate to it — so the three deployment forms cannot drift, and no flavor is another flavor's worker.

See Also:
  • FaviconMixin
  • FaviconResource
  • FaviconServlet
  • REST Server — Composition (mixins, paths)
Since:
10.0.0

    • serve

      public HttpResource serve()
      Serves the configured favicon bytes.
      Returns:
      The favicon as an HttpResource with Content-Type: image/x-icon and the configured Cache-Control header.
